function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, used cast as canonical birthday source, and cited only files read in this run.
function.outcome_justification: Using today from context (2026-03-30), the cast birthday inventory search showed upcoming birthdays and the earliest future date is 05-21. The canonical record 10_entities/cast/tobias.md confirms the exact name tied to that date: Tobias Kern.
